subject: docs: update stale references to removed @theme block and brand colors
body:
SESSION_NOTES and HISTORY still referenced brand colors in @theme and
hardcoded CashflowGraph hex — both removed in prior commit. Updated
to reflect current state: @theme block gone, chart reads DaisyUI tokens
at runtime via useThemeColor.ts.
